caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on a political statement made by Bola Tinubu. The headline reads, "2023: It’s my lifelong ambition to become President — Tinubu," indicating that Tinubu has expressed his desire to run for the presidency in Nigeria. The text also mentions that he has informed Buhari of his ambition and adds that he is a "kingmaker that wants to become king." The image shows Tinubu wearing a traditional hat, and the caption below the image reiterates, "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu." The video likely discusses Tinubu's political aspirations and his belief in his necessity for Nigeria's future. The Plus Politics banner and the YouTube channel link suggest that this is part of a larger series covering political news and events in Africa.
